executives.name: Alex Klenman
executives.background: Mr. Klenman is an experienced junior mining executive whose career spans over 30 years in the private and public sectors. Over the past decade he has held a number of senior management and board positions in the public markets.

executives.name: Vivian Katsuris
executives.background: Ms. Katsuris has over 25 years of experience in the brokerage industry and the junior capital markets. She has served as a director and officer of several public companies.

executives.name: Trevor Perkins
executives.background: Mr. Perkins is a professional geologist with over 25 years of experience in mineral exploration, including 10 years with Cameco Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Alex Klenman
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Klenman is an experienced junior mining executive whose career spans over 30 years in the private and public sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Ted O'Connor
board_of_directors.background: Mr. O'Connor has over 25 years of experience in the uranium industry, including 19 years with Cameco Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Gill
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gill is the President of AJS Management Inc., a company providing management consulting services.

board_of_directors.name: Saurabh Handa
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Handa is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in the mining industry.
